title: Glacier GUI
description: GlacierGUI is a clean, stylish Minecraft GUI with a Japanese-themed panorama and a fully custom UI for every button, including Singleplayer, Multiplayer, and World Selection. Designed for a unique and immersive experience!
body:
### ABOUT

**GlacierGUI is a sleek, white-themed Minecraft GUI overlay inspired by minimalist Japanese design. Built for players who prefer a clean, distraction-free interface, this GUI is ideal for Bedwars, PvP, and content creators aiming for a sharp aesthetic that complements white-themed resource packs**

### Key Features:

**Minimalistic White Theme:**
Crafted with precision and inspired by Japanese simplicity, the interface features clean lines, balanced spacing, and a soft color palette that ensures readability without visual clutter.

**Optimized for FPS:**
GlacierGUI is built with performance in mind. It contains no heavy elements or unnecessary animations, ensuring smooth gameplay even on low-end and mid-end PCs.

**Distraction-Free Experience:**
This GUI overlay excludes common distractions like armor indicators and GUI sounds, giving players a fully silent and clean interface. Perfect for competitive gameplay or cinematic recording.

**Content Creator Friendly:**
The design supports recording and streaming with a sharp, professional look that stands out in thumbnails and videos without overpowering the main visuals of gameplay.

**Compatibility**:
Works best with white-themed packs, GlacierShaders, and other visual enhancements designed around a light and clean aesthetic.

Whether you're a casual player, competitive PvPer, or YouTuber looking for a fresh UI look, GlacierGUI delivers both performance and elegance in one minimalist package.
